title: User Management
subtitle: Manage user accounts, roles, and access permissions

table.empty: No users found. Create your first user to get started.

dialog.createDesc: A temporary password will be generated. The user must change it on first login.

password.resetDesc: This will generate a new temporary password and revoke all active sessions.
password.closeWhenReady: Close this dialog when you have saved the password.

confirm.deactivateDesc: This will prevent the user from logging in. This action can be reversed later.

toast.createdDesc: The new user has been created. Share the temporary password securely.
toast.deactivatedDesc: The user can no longer log in.
toast.passwordResetDesc: A new temporary password has been generated.
toast.errorDesc: Something went wrong. Please try again.
